title: pothos oliganthus
intro: Pothos oliganthus, also known as the climbing pothos or golden pothos, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Arumaceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pothos oliganthus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Pothos oliganthus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
